- **FOMC HELD June 17:** 4.25-4.50%, Kevin Warsh first meeting. Dot plot neutral (0-1 hike 2026). Less hawkish than pre-FOMC fear.
- **Iran deal:** Signed June 15. Ceremony June 19 (Juneteenth). Strait of Hormuz reopening = oil normalization = CPI path improved.
- **AI capex secular:** NVDA Blackwell, AMD EPYC, MRVL Teralynx T100, INTC IFS all intact. Post-FOMC hold removes rate headwind for AI stocks.
- **MRVL S&P 500 inclusion June 22:** Passive index funds MUST buy ~$2-4B+ of MRVL. Pre-inclusion window closing (5 trading days). June 18 is last high-conviction entry before passive buy accelerates.
- **Key events ahead:** June 18 (MANDATORY ENTRY DAY), June 19 (Juneteenth CLOSED), June 23 (resume — MU exit if holding), June 24 (MU earnings), June 26 (PCE inflation data).

memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-17 Daily Review (3 things that worked)

1. **Exemption 2 discipline held all day.** Despite 3 mandatory names (MRVL 7.67, INTC 7.17, AMD 7.50) scoring above threshold, all were correctly skipped through the FOMC binary event. Score discipline !== trigger-happy.
2. **Post-FOMC scenario planning pre-built.** Midday built A/B/C outcome plans. Scenario A (neutral dot) confirmed. June 18 MOO response was already documented — execute, don't re-research.
3. **AMD stale GTC alert documented and escalated.** Midday issued the 87-minute warning. Operator had actionable information despite API blockage.

### 2026-06-17 Daily Review (3 things to improve)

1. **June 18 MOO: execute before 9:25AM ET.** MRVL 8sh + INTC 38sh + AMD 9sh. This is binding from 5+ daily reviews. No more deferrals.
2. **Operator must cancel AMD stale GTCs ($520.59, $524.15) before Pre-Market.** AMD est. ~$532-545 = only ~1.5-4% above limits. Cancel before 8AM ET June 18.
3. **Afternoon routine must sustain post-FOMC.** June 17 failure at 2PM ET was the highest-cost silent failure since June 5 blackout. The cloud infrastructure must support consecutive sessions through critical windows.

### 2026-06-12 Daily Review (3 things that worked)

1. **Fresh scoring at new price level.** INTC was MANDATORY at $106 (June 10). After +16% gap to $123, fresh 6-agent run correctly (7.33 — still approved). Score discipline works.
2. **LMT thesis inversion recognized immediately.** Iran deal progress flipped defense from bullish to bearish within 24h. Score correctly fell from est. 7.33 → 5.5. No momentum bias.
3. **PPI condition enforced despite MU +11.66% temptation.** MU jumped 11.66% June 11 while our PPI condition (≤+0.3%) was violated at +1.1%. Skip held firm.

### 2026-06-12 Daily Review (3 things to improve)

1. **INTC MUST EXECUTE (31 consecutive blocks).** From $106 (June 10) to $123 (June 12) = +16% while waiting. GTC bracket approach: place before Sunday FOMC window.
2. **Cancel stale GTC orders (AMD $524/$520, PLTR $150, MRVL $202) BEFORE Monday.** MRVL at $202 is especially dangerous (MRVL at $295 = 30% crash risk landmine).
3. **Post-FOMC deployment plan pre-built.** Wednesday June 18 = first clean window. Execute INTC + MRVL + AMD simultaneously (max 3 limit brackets Pre-Market). No fresh research needed at 8AM Wed — execute the pre-built plan.
